title: Dolicholus longeracemosus
taxonomy: Dolicholus longeracemosus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Dolicholus, which contains various species of legumes. The classification of this plant is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the division Magnoliophyta. This plant is native to certain regions, and its classification helps in understanding its characteristics and evolutionary history. Further research is needed to provide a more comprehensive classification of Dolicholus longeracemosus.
